article_title: Microsoft Pauses New Carbon Removal Purchases, Sending Shockwaves Through an Industry It Dominated

findings.message: Source redirected to different domain: consent.yahoo.com

content_preview.title: Microsoft Pauses New Carbon Removal Purchases, Sending Shockwaves Through an Industry It Dominated
content_preview.summary: Microsoft staff have informed carbon removal developers that the company is pausing new purchases, a move that rattles a market in which the tech giant accounted for 96 percent of 2025 credit purchases.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Microsoft staff have begun informing carbon removal project developers that the company is pausing new purchases of carbon dioxide removal credits, according to [Bloomberg](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-04-11/microsoft-staff-tell-developers-it-s-pausing-co2-removals-deals). The move threatens to destabilize the nascent carbon removal industry, in which Microsoft has served as the dominant buyer since launching its $1 billion Climate Innovation Fund in 2020.

Bloomberg...
